description: [UNVERIFIED — authored from official API docs; test with your API key before signing] ClickUp API v2 via a personal API token — read your profile, workspaces (teams), spaces, lists, and tasks, and create tasks. The token is sent RAW in the 'Authorization' header (no 'Bearer ' prefix).

credentialFields.name: apiToken
credentialFields.label: Personal API Token
credentialFields.description: Create at ClickUp → Settings → Apps → API Token. ClickUp expects the raw token in the Authorization header WITHOUT a 'Bearer ' prefix — this manifest sends it as 'Authorization: <token>'.

tools.name: clickup_get_user
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's account details.

tools.name: clickup_list_teams
tools.description: List the Workspaces (called 'teams' in the API) the token can access.

tools.name: clickup_list_spaces
tools.description: List the Spaces in a Workspace.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Workspace id (the API calls Workspaces 'teams'). From clickup_list_teams.

tools.name: clickup_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks in a List (max 100 per page).

tools.name: clickup_get_task
tools.description: Get a single task by id.

params.name: custom_task_ids
params.description: Set true to look up by a custom task id; then team_id is required.

params.name: team_id
params.description: Workspace id — required only when custom_task_ids is true.

tools.name: clickup_create_task
tools.description: Create a task in a List.

params.name: list_id
params.description: List id to create the task in.

params.name: task
params.description: { "name": string (required), "description"?: string, "assignees"?: number[], "status"?: string, "priority"?: number, "due_date"?: number (epoch ms), "tags"?: string[] }
